name: @dk/estelle
description: Estelle launches pi pre-configured with the upstream Shipshape skills and the Estelle enforcement extension.

scripts.build: tsc src/index.ts --ignoreConfig --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 --outDir dist --rootDir src --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target ES2022 --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck
